θειώδης, ες (θεῖος ±ώδης; Diod S 2, 12, 2; Strabo 1, 3, 18; Hero Alex. I p. 12, 8; III p. 214, 7; Aretaeus 170, 12; Galen: CMG V 4, 2 p. 107, 33; 186, 5 al.) sulphurous Rv 9:17.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Hero Alex. Hero Alex. = Hero(n) of Alexandria, I? b.c./I a.d.—List 5

Aretaeus Aretaeus , II a.d.—List 5

Galen Galen , II a.d.—List 5

CMG CMG = Corpus Medicorum Graecorum—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)
